ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dock_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dock station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dock station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dock station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the dock station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the dock station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the station was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the station was last updated */,
  "total_docks" INTEGER /* Total number of docks at the station */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently docked at the station */,
  "capacity_type" TEXT /* Type of capacity (e.g., fixed, dynamic) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_types" (
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike type (e.g., e-bike, single bike) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bike type */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity for e-bikes (if applicable) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the bike */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the bike */,
  "rental_cost" REAL /* Cost per minute or hour for renting the bike */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended interval for maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_bike_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dock station */,
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike type */,
  "available_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes of the specified type */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the availability record */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of docks available for the bike type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the availability was updated */,
  "predicted_demand" INTEGER /* Predicted demand for the bike type at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_bike_availability_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES dock_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_bike_availability_bike_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type_id") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dock station */,
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike type */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., check-in, check-out) */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the specific bike involved in the transaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the bike rental (for check-out transactions) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, mobile payment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_transactions_bike_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type_id") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_transactions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES dock_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., rider, admin, maintenance) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "preferred_station" INTEGER /* Preferred dock station for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dock station */,
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike type */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine check, repair) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the maintenance */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the specific bike being maintained */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion for the maintenance */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the maintenance was completed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES dock_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_bike_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type_id") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id")
)
